title: AI agents must be treated as untrusted systems: Researchers
summary: AI agents are becoming increasingly popular among crypto users, with Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire predicting that billions of AI agents will be operating within five years.

title: Scammers make $400K through fake Uniswap ads on Google
summary: A blockchain analyst has warned that malicious phishing advertisements impersonating Uniswap have appeared on Google Search, which has netted attackers at least $400,000.

title: Danish Central Bank Warns of Housing Risks on Price Rally
summary: A surge in Copenhagen home prices is spilling over to the rest of Denmark, posing growing risks to the country’s lenders, the central bank said.

title: ECB Set to Lift Its Inflation Outlook in June, Lane Tells Nikkei
summary: The European Central Bank will probably raise its quarterly projection for inflation next month as the Iran war keeps energy prices elevated, Chief Economist Philip Lane told Nikkei in remarks published Monday.

title: The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin

The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
Bitcoin is invisible code — but for over a decade, creators have turned it into coins, cards, and USBs you can touch. Here’s how close we’ve gotten to real, cash-like BTC.

title: Tom Lee Outlines Liquidity Catalyst for Ethereum Firm BitMine Following Russell Index Update
summary: The Ethereum-buying firm owns 3.8% of the digital asset’s supply.

title: Famed iPhone, Sony Hacker Says AI Coding Agents Are a Disaster Waiting to Happen
summary: George Hotz spent six months testing agents on real projects and came away convinced they're creating an avalanche of undetectable slop—and that large organizations won't realize it until it's too late.

title: Robinhood clears final regulatory approval for $180M WonderFi deal ahead of expected June 1 close
summary: Canada's CIRO approved Robinhood's acquisition of WonderFi, clearing the final regulatory hurdle ahead of an expected June 1 close.

title: Bitget launches RWA platform Reality in tokenization push
summary: Bitget said Reality will initially offer tokenized exposure to selected U.S. stocks and ETFs through its broader trading ecosystem.

title: US strikes Iranian missile sites as peace talks continue

title: Iran is beating Trump at the art of the deal
summary: The war could end with Tehran more confident, more hardline and with new resources to rebuild its nuclear programme
